entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,603Chapters: 2/8Kudos: 0

entry.title: wolf
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,229Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: As Eddie shifted, stretching his hind legs out, the heavy blanket slipped slightly. Buck’s eyes opened, absentminded curiosity making him track the movement. His heart stuttered. There, nestled amid the dark fur, was the wolf’s sheath, nestled in the dark fur of his lower belly, a subtle shape that Buck had seen a hundred times and never truly registered. A sudden, sharp spike of heat flared in Buck’s stomach. The wolf’s cock was big. Even partially unsheathed and at rest, the length of it was staggering. Buck’s mind tried to do the math—tried to imagine what it would look like fully aroused, fully extended—and his thoughts went white and static, like a radio tuned to nothing. /// Buck begged to be bred by full shift werewolf Eddie.

entry.title: kitchen sex
entry.summary:
Author: Ramsey_Writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 807Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Sinking to his knees, Buck didn't take his eyes off Eddie. His hands were steady and urgent as he reached for Eddie's belt, the metallic click of the buckle loud in the small space. He worked the button and lowered the zipper. Eddie’s breath hitched as he looked down, his fingers curling tightly over the edge of the counter until his knuckles turned white. The cool air of the kitchen hit his skin, but he barely noticed it over the radiating heat of Buck being so close. OR Buck gives Eddie a blow job.

entry.title: You're A Liability (You're A Little Much For Me)
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherWriterInTheDark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,611Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 89

Summary: After the tsunami hit LA ,Buck is having a hard time trusting himself again. He feels like he is slowly slipping trough the cracks and he is doing it all alone. All he wants is to go back to his family, to be a part of the team again, to be where he belongs. But what if they don’t want him back? What if they don’t trust him either?…This is my take on how I think the tsunami-and-Buck-suing-the-department storyline would have effected him and his relationship with Eddie, Chris and the 118. I often feel like they should have made Buck suffer more in the aftermath. (sorry not sorry) Oh also I scratched the whole underground fighting storyline because it gives me the ick. (gave Eddie something else to cry about though) xx

entry.title: Just Pretend
entry.summary:
Author: You_and_that_Chain_of_Command

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,458Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: It was a fairly normal day at the firehouse, no unusual calls. Just the regular old kid stuck in a tree, kitchen fire, and someone choking on a tampon. Normal. It had been unusually qui- peaceful, no fire alarms through breakfast, no midworkout calls. Just silent. That’s until Athena barged in. Bobby was in the middle of making his world famous spaghetti sauce, when Athena had barged into the kitchen. She let out a groan clutching at her back, raising her arms she let out a yawn. “Hey honey,” She finally said as she turned across the island to hug Bobby. “I need a favor.”. She said, pressing a kiss to Bobby's mouth. He quickly glanced around the firehouse, the rest of the team was sat downstairs watching television. Letting a small gasp come from his mouth he turned to her. “We’re in a firehouse!” He said, looking shocked. “Oh my lord,” She sighed and brought her hand to head. “Not that kind of favor.”. Bobby’s face changed to relief. “What kind of favor would you need then?” He asked. “It’s kind of a longshot, but-”. Or Buck and Eddie have to go undercover as couple to help get information for a drug trafficking case.

entry.title: Loving Sin
entry.summary:
Author: Warlock_Nerd

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,140Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 154

Summary: While in Texas, Christopher had moved into his dad’s childhood bedroom and one night when he couldn’t sleep, he decided to go through the taped up old boxes he found in the closet. In there he finds something that makes him want to run away. He found a journal. His dad’s journal from when he was sixteen. And from reading it, Christopher found out his dad was sent to a conversion camp when he was caught kissing a boy by his parents. Panicked and scared, Christopher calls Buck, demanding him to come get him. TW - Homophobia, Homophobic language, Conversion camp/therapy, Repressed memories, Abusive Helena and Ramon Diaz, Child Abuse references, Religious abuse and Catholic guilt.

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,423Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 84

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet.While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead.Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

entry.title: Universal Interference
entry.summary:
Author: FishMagee

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,015Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Buck is getting married. Suddenly, Buck and Eddie can't seem to make it through one simple interaction without it ending in bickering. And not the cute kind.After a nasty argument in which Eddie accuses Buck of rushing into a marriage out of loneliness rather than love, Buck uninvites Eddie from the wedding. Driving home, Eddie gets into a car accident and is knocked out. He awakes in a Los Angeles street full of water. Soon he realizes that he's in the past.And he's not the only one.

entry.title: corpus delicti
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,215Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 117

Summary: "So." Buck takes another sip of coffee, real slow, savoring the wind-up. He sets the mug down with a soft clink. "Princess."Eddie closes his eyes.This is it. This is where they find him face down in his eggs. Chimney's going to have to call Pepa. Pepa is going to be furious. The funeral will be small and Buck better wear something hideous to it, Buck better wear that godawful floral shirt with the parrots, the one Eddie told him was ugly out loud one time two years ago and has been secretly obsessed with ever since, because Eddie deserves the satisfaction of being buried while looking at it."Buck." He says it into his toast.Buck shrugs. "I'm just asking.""You're not asking. You're enjoying yourself.""I'm doing both, Eds, I’m versatile."Or,Eddie gains a boyfriend, a pair of lace panties, and learns a lot about himself in the span of forty-eight hours.

entry.title: And all the wounds that are ever gonna scar me
entry.summary:
Author: TipHahah

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,986Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: +"I'm here as a friend, family, confidant, anything you would like. I was once here, standing nervously in-front of Thomas. Not Jane, she was off having a baby, or something cool like that" Jane lets out an unexpected laugh and some recruits breathe out a laugh as well. "But I had no-one to count on. I had no family. I made mistakes in my Probationary - Probie - year. And a heap after that too. I'm here to build trust, and I want you all to know, I care. If you want me to be, I'll be at all your events. Big or Small."Jane claps and the recruits join in. Buck's face heats, and he ducks his head. Jane starts her part of the recruitment speech, but Buck tunes her out. He's heard it all before.+OR After Red dies buck starts adopting the stray probies. This is them getting Buck and Eddie together, plus the fire-fam getting involved too,

entry.title: Catch Me When I Fall
entry.summary:
Author: blackrose_17

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: “We had a bother, his name was Daniel.” Daniel had been something that haunted her for years. She had grown up for years keeping the fact that they had an older brother hidden from Buck; the longer she had kept the secret, the harder it became to tell Buck about him, but now it was time. Buck hasn't seen his parents in years, so when Maddie informs him that they are coming to LA, he isn't sure if he should be happy or dread their visit.

entry.title: fix-it diaz
entry.summary:
Author: diazkissed

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,265Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 51

Summary: “I was brushing my teeth and saw how crooked the cabinets were—I wanted to fix the hinges real quick, that’s all. Promise.” “I think you were doing a lot more than that, Eddie,” Buck laughed under his breath, rubbing his temple as he tried to calm himself down after getting up so fast. “You’re usually so quiet at night, you freaked me out.” Eddie, frowning, realized the weight of his actions and maneuvered his body to come in front of Buck. He carefully lifted Buck’s face in his hands and gazed into the ocean eyes that could easily swallow him whole. “M’sorry about that, darling. Things have been… bugging me more lately, that’s all.” “I read online that…” Buck drawled at the same time Eddie chuckled in disbelief, “…you’re nesting.” “Nesting?” Eddie blinked, tugging the corner of his lips into a small smirk. “Yeah,” Buck gently lowered Eddie’s arms. He gestured to the bathroom once more, but this time, with an obvious scan of a simple, nonjudgmental stare. He met Eddie’s brown eyes again with a pointed look. “Nesting.”OR: 5 times Eddie experienced nesting before Buck had their twins, and 1 time he didn't have to.

entry.title: Maybe Forever
entry.summary:
Author: sleepywrite_2134

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,626Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 32

Summary: "Buck, I need you to listen to me." "I am listening, Eddie." "No, you think I'm crazy." “You did just tell me we’re unicorns since we like boys.” Why was Eddie stabbed if he was just gonna sit in an elevator? The Buddie ending we deserved. Updates are still coming, no clue when the book will be done.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Leaving and Growing Up
entry.summary:
Author: ratking_withnotail

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 344,837Chapters: 26/30Kudos: 1,269

Summary: Percy Jackson was excited—genuinely excited—for the first time in what felt like years. A new city. A new name. A new face, even. The golden hair, the pale blue eyes, the tattoos that traced his skin like constellations—none of it screamed “Percy Jackson” anymore. He was Evan Buckley now, or just Buck, depending on who asked. He’d keep busy—physically exhausted, mentally occupied, emotionally detached. That was the key. No attachments. No friendships. No relationships. No vulnerability. He’d learned the hard way that getting close to people only ended in pain. Either they died, betrayed him, or saw the legend behind the name and stopped seeing him altogether. Unfortunately, he hadn’t planned on the 118.

entry.title: You're a Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: Little_Moon_33

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,580Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 68

Summary: "My memory is fine," Eddie snapped. "It's everyone else's memory that's fucked up." Rylen continued, ignoring the interruption, "we try to not offer too much information into their personal lives. Especially when that information can be harmful to the psyche." Ozwaldo opened the file, pulling out whatever was on top, offering it to Eddie. "Your Mr Buckley died, just about three years ago." -----AKA: What if the entire town gaslights (both accidentally and on purpose) Buck and Eddie that the other died in the 9x13 car crash.
